## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test

## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet test tests/Vault.Tests/Vault.Tests.csproj -f net8.0 -c Release`
- [ ] Relevant manual verification completed

## Security Checklist (if applicable)

- [ ] No secrets exposed in logs or UI
- [ ] Wrong-password path still fails safely
- [ ] Corrupted/tampered vault path still fails safely
- [ ] Docs updated for file format or architecture changes

## Release Notes

Provide concise notes that can be reused in CHANGELOG/release description.
